name: Cybersecurity
description: An in-depth guide to protecting systems, networks, and data from digital threats.

subtopics.name: 0. Prerequisites
subtopics.description: Build the foundational IT knowledge needed for a career in cybersecurity.

subtopics.name: 1. Security Foundations
subtopics.description: Learn the core principles, key terms, and threat landscape of cybersecurity.

subtopics.name: 2. OS & System Security
subtopics.description: Master the fundamentals of securing operating systems like Linux and Windows.

subtopics.name: 3. Network Security
subtopics.description: Discover how to secure network infrastructure from unauthorized access and threats.

subtopics.name: 4. Threats & Vulnerabilities
subtopics.description: An in-depth look at malware, social engineering, and vulnerability management.

subtopics.name: 5. Application Security
subtopics.description: Learn to identify and mitigate vulnerabilities like the OWASP Top 10 in software.

subtopics.name: 6. Identity & Access Management (IAM)
subtopics.description: Understand how to manage user identities and control access to critical systems.

subtopics.name: 7. Security Operations (SecOps)
subtopics.description: Explore how to monitor systems, detect threats, and respond to security incidents.

subtopics.name: 8. Cryptography
subtopics.description: Explore the science of secure communication, hashing, and data protection.

subtopics.name: 9. Governance, Risk & Compliance
subtopics.description: Learn about security frameworks, risk management, and data privacy regulations.

subtopics.name: 10. Cloud Security
subtopics.description: Understand the unique security challenges and solutions for cloud environments.

subtopics.name: 11. Offensive Security (Red Team)
subtopics.description: Dive into the world of ethical hacking and penetration testing to find vulnerabilities.

body.raw: Understand the principles and practices of cybersecurity. This section covers cryptography, network security, ethical hacking, and threat modeling to protect digital assets.
body.html: Understand the principles and practices of cybersecurity. This section covers cryptography, network security, ethical hacking, and threat modeling to protect digital assets.
